decks.notes: The main focus of this deck is to maintain control over the game by countering opponent's spells, clearing the board, and drawing cards. The deck includes a mix of removal spells, counter spells, and card draw effects to control the tempo of the game. Additionally, the inclusion of Kaheera, the Orphanguard as a companion adds an additional element of synergy by providing a consistent creature threat. The deck aims to outlast opponents and eventually win through card advantage and strategic plays.

This deck focuses on playing aggressive creatures like Ragavan, Nimble Pilferer and Ocelot Pride, supported by burn spells like Lightning Bolt and Galvanic Discharge. Ajani, Nacatl Pariah provides additional value, while Fable of the Mirror-Breaker and Goblin Bombardment can help close out games quickly. The deck also includes disruptive elements like Blood Moon and Ranger-Captain of Eos to disrupt the opponent's game plan. Overall, this Boros Aggro deck aims to quickly pressure the opponent and finish them off before they can stabilize.

The main idea of this Boros Aggro deck is to quickly overwhelm the opponent with aggressive creatures and efficient removal spells. The deck focuses on dealing damage fast and efficiently, using cards like Galvanic Discharge, Voice of Victory, and Ragavan, Nimble Pilferer to put pressure on the opponent. Ajani, Nacatl Pariah and Ocelot Pride provide additional support and buffs to the creatures. The deck also includes ways to protect its creatures with cards like Thraben Charm and has a few utility lands like Arena of Glory and Dalkovan Encampment to give it flexibility in combat.

The deck aims to quickly fill the graveyard with powerful creatures like Archon of Cruelty and then bring them back on the battlefield using cards like Persist and Unearth. It utilizes a combination of discard spells, counter magic, and removal to protect the combo pieces and disrupt the opponent's strategy. The deck also includes cards like Fatal Push and Spell Snare to control the board and outvalue the opponent. By efficiently reanimating threats and continuously disrupting the opponent's game plan, the deck aims to overwhelm the opponent and clinch victory.

The main focus of this deck is to quickly reduce your own life total to boost the power of Death's Shadow, while also disrupting your opponent's game plan with counterspells and removal spells. The deck relies on a combination of efficient threats like Nethergoyf and Murktide Regent, along with disruption from cards like Thoughtseize and Stubborn Denial. The goal is to apply pressure early and force your opponent to react to your threats, all while maintaining control over the game with a mix of disruption and card selection.

This deck focuses on utilizing Eldrazi creatures with aggressive abilities to quickly overwhelm the opponent. It includes cards like Devourer of Destiny, Eldrazi Linebreaker, and Thought-Knot Seer to put pressure on the opponent early in the game. The deck also includes removal spells like Kozilek's Command and All Is Dust to deal with opposing threats and clear the way for its creatures. With the mana acceleration provided by cards like Eldrazi Temple and Cavern of Souls, this deck aims to maintain a fast pace and outpace the opponent to secure victory.

The main idea of this deck is to fill the graveyard with creatures and then cast Living End to bring them all back onto the battlefield, overwhelming the opponent with a massive board presence. The deck also includes disruptive elements like Force of Negation and Subtlety to control the game until it can execute its combo. The various creatures in the deck serve different purposes, whether it's generating mana, providing card advantage, or simply being powerful threats. Ultimately, the goal is to win through a combination of efficient creatures and the powerful Living End spell.

The deck focuses on ramping up mana quickly using the UrzaTron lands and Eldrazi Temple to cast powerful Eldrazi creatures and game-changing spells. It also utilizes control elements with cards like Thought-Knot Seer, Chalice of the Void, and Ugin, the Spirit Dragon to disrupt opponents' strategies. Karn, the Great Creator provides additional versatility by accessing sideboard cards. The deck aims to overwhelm opponents with high-powered threats while also controlling the game with disruptive spells and abilities.

The deck focuses on quickly ramping up mana using Eldrazi Temple and other lands to cast powerful Eldrazi creatures like It That Heralds the End and Thought-Knot Seer. It also utilizes cards like Devourer of Destiny and Eldrazi Linebreaker to apply pressure and disrupt the opponent's strategy. Chalice of the Void helps to control the opponent's spells, while cards like Kozilek's Command and Sire of Seven Deaths provide removal and additional threats. The deck aims to overwhelm the opponent with a fast, aggressive Eldrazi strategy in a Modern 1 vs 1 format.

The key strategy of this deck revolves around using powerful Eldrazi creatures and synergistic support cards to generate massive amounts of mana and overwhelm the opponent with devastating creature combinations and abilities. The deck focuses on deploying threats quickly and efficiently while disrupting the opponent's game plan with removal spells and versatile utility cards. By assembling the right pieces and executing the combo effectively, the deck aims to create a dominant board presence and close out the game in a decisive manner.

This deck focuses on assembling the UrzaTron lands to generate a large amount of mana quickly, allowing the player to cast powerful Eldrazi creatures like Thought-Knot Seer and Emrakul, the Promised End. The deck also includes control elements like Karn, the Great Creator and Ugin, the Eye of the Storms to handle opponent's threats. The use of cards like Glaring Fleshraker and Vexing Bauble provide additional disruption. Overall, the deck aims to control the game and overwhelm the opponent with massive creatures and powerful spells.

The deck focuses on utilizing Broodscale Bloodchief and other Eldrazi creatures to create a powerful combo that can quickly overwhelm the opponent. By ramping up mana with cards like Urza's Saga and Eldrazi Temple, the deck can bring out powerful creatures like Emrakul, the Promised End. Cards like Glaring Fleshraker and Devourer of Destiny help control the board while Malevolent Rumble and Kozilek's Command provide additional removal options. The deck aims to establish board presence early and snowball into a dominant position with its combo pieces.

The deck focuses on assembling a fast and aggressive board presence by utilizing artifact creatures and artifacts to overwhelm the opponent. It includes various artifact synergies and utility cards to support the aggressive strategy, while also controlling the opponent's board with removal and disruption spells. The deck aims to quickly establish a strong board presence and apply pressure to the opponent, while also having the flexibility to adapt to different game situations with its versatile card choices.

This deck focuses on aggressive creatures that can be repeatedly blinked in and out of play to generate value and disrupt the opponent's game plan. By utilizing cards like Ephemerate and Flickerwisp, the deck aims to control the board and pressure the opponent with efficient threats like Phelia, Exuberant Shepherd and Overlord of the Balemurk. Fatal Push and Thoughtseize are included for additional disruption and removal, while cards like Emperor of Bones and Quantum Riddler provide additional utility and card advantage. Overall, the deck aims to overwhelm the opponent with a combination of aggression and disruption through the use of blink effects.

The main concept of this Affinity Aggro deck is to utilize cheap artifacts and resource manipulation to quickly overwhelm the opponent with aggressive threats. The deck aims to efficiently deploy artifacts using cards like Mox Opal and Mishra's Bauble to power out early threats like Kappa Cannoneer and Pinnacle Emissary. Cards like Metallic Rebuke and Tormod's Crypt provide disruption and protection, while Urza's Saga and Weapons Manufacturing help generate incremental advantage. The deck aims to win through a combination of aggression and resource denial, ultimately overpowering the opponent before they can establish their game plan.

This Boros Aggro deck focuses on aggressive creature tactics combined with burn spells and enchantments to quickly overwhelm opponents. The deck utilizes cards like Ajani, Nacatl Pariah and Ragavan, Nimble Pilferer to deal damage early on, while also using Goblin Bombardment and Guide of Souls for additional damage and control. With a mix of creature buffs, removal, and disruption spells like Blood Moon and Static Prison, this deck aims to maintain pressure and control the board while closing out games swiftly.
